ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.notes: Original EU/ICC Certificate of Origin, No. SEG-26D-467261, issued 2026-03-04 by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Gothenburg. Page 2 of the certificate file is the commercial invoice (embedded copy) — per rule 8.5.0 this embedded invoice is NOT used for verification.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.notes: Commercial Invoice# PI61085, dated 2026-03-04, issued by Breas Medical AB, Sweden.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Breas Medical AB' identified in invoice footer and branding block.
Consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' identified in invoice delivery address.
No explicit invoice number reference in certificate, but consignor, consignee, goods, date all align.
pairing_validation.motivation: Pairing validated: Certificate consignor 'Breas Medical AB' is identified as the invoice issuer (footer: 'Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE:435 33 MÖLNLYCKE, SWEDEN'; branding block: 'Breas Medical AB Sweden'). Certificate consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' is found in invoice delivery address. Article numbers match exactly between certificate and invoice. Date matches. Pairing is valid.

locations: Invoice footer: 'Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE:435 33 MÖLNLYCKE, SWEDEN'
Invoice branding block (bottom center): 'Breas Medical AB Sweden'
Invoice signatory block: 'Simon Gustavsson, Shipping Coordinator' under Breas Medical AB

consignor.certificate_value: Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, 43533, Mölnlycke, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE:435 33 MÖLNLYCKE, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Breas Medical AB' anywhere in invoice files.
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'Breas Medical AB' found in invoice footer address block ('Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE:435 33 MÖLNLYCKE, SWEDEN'), in branding block ('Breas Medical AB Sweden'), and as signatory entity. Country 'Sweden' confirmed via explicit 'SWEDEN' in footer and SE-prefix in VAT number SE556434896801.

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Land verification via indirect identifiers – SE prefix in VAT number confirms Sweden

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, 43533, Mölnlycke, Sweden'. Invoice issuer (footer): 'Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE:435 33 MÖLNLYCKE, SWEDEN'. The company name matches exactly after normalization. Address matches: 'Företagsvägen 1' is identical; '43533' vs 'SE:435 33' differ only in formatting (SE postal code prefix and spacing). Country: 'Sweden' in certificate matches 'SWEDEN' in invoice footer, confirmed also by SE-prefix VAT number SE556434896801. Result: MATCH per rule 4.1.0.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Breas Medical AB' found explicitly in invoice footer and branding block. Address 'Företagsvägen 1' matches. Country 'Sweden' confirmed by explicit text and SE-prefix in VAT number. MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Swift Egypt Limited, P.O. Box#: 11861, New Cargo Village - Building CT2, VAT ID: 404-101-488, Egypt
consignee.invoice_value: Swift Egypt Limited, Cairo International Airport, New Cargo Village - Building CT2, Unit 3A, P.O. Box#: 11861, VAT ID: 404-101-488, 11776 Cairo, Egypt

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has 'Customer address' field (Total Care) and 'Delivery address' field (Swift Egypt Limited). 'Customer address' functions as the billing/buyer field. Certificate consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' does NOT match 'Total Care' in customer address field.
comparison_steps.details: Customer address (billing) = 'Total Care, Egypt'. Delivery address = 'Swift Egypt Limited, Egypt'. Certificate consignee = 'Swift Egypt Limited'. Consignee does not match billing party. Check Ship-To-regel 4.2.0.3.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate consignee matches Ship-To/Delivery address in invoice and conditions are met.
comparison_steps.details: 1. Certificate consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' exactly matches invoice Delivery address name 'Swift Egypt Limited'. 2. Invoice Customer address (Bill-To) = 'Total Care' — a different party (trade/distribution company). 3. Both 'Swift Egypt Limited' (delivery) and 'Total Care' (customer) appear in the SAME invoice, confirming they are part of the same supply chain transaction. 4. No information in the invoice contradicts that Swift Egypt Limited is the actual end-recipient of the goods. All conditions of 4.2.0.3 are met.
Certificate: Egypt. Invoice delivery address: Egypt. Match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority order for consignee identification – Customer address is primary billing field
rules_applied.outcome: Consignee not found in billing field

rules_applied.rule_description: Ship-To-regel – Certificate issued for end recipient (Ship-To party)

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Swift Egypt Limited, Egypt'. Invoice has two address blocks: 'Delivery address' = 'Swift Egypt Limited, Egypt' and 'Customer address' = 'Total Care, Egypt'. Per 4.2.0.2, the Customer address (billing) has priority. Certificate consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' does NOT match 'Total Care'. However, per 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To-regel), the certificate may be issued for the end-recipient (Ship-To). All 4 conditions are met: (1) 'Swift Egypt Limited' exactly matches delivery address; (2) 'Total Care' is a different party in the billing field; (3) both parties appear in the same invoice confirming same supply chain; (4) nothing contradicts Swift Egypt Limited as actual goods recipient. VAT ID 404-101-488 matches between certificate and invoice delivery address. Country Egypt matches. Result: MATCH per 4.2.0.3.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because consignee does not match Customer address (Total Care)
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rejected because Ship-To-regel 4.2.0.3 explicitly permits matching against delivery address when the certificate is issued for the end-recipient. All conditions are met.

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' exactly matches invoice Delivery address. Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3) applied: certificate issued for end-recipient, Customer address 'Total Care' is the billing intermediary. VAT ID 404-101-488 matches. Country Egypt matches. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: 009682 - Interface/BackCoverKit Vivo1,2 x 4 pc; 004702 - VIVO 5x / 6x PSU x 1 pc; 007644 - CPU board Vivo 3 Multi x 6 pc; 007627 - Interface module Vivo 3 x 5 pc; 007641 - Blower assembly Vivo 1-2-3 x 6 pc; 009683 - Interface/BackCoverKit Vivo 3 x 5 pc; 007639 - Front panel Vivo 3 x 4 pc; 006774 - Pneum block/PTU board, Vivo 65 x 1 pc; 006916 - CPU Vivo 65 EN x 1 pc; 007642 - CPU board Vivo 1 Multi x 1 pc; 227185 - Vivo 1 EG with disposable circuit and humidifier x 20 pc; Medical devices and accessories, 2 Pallets

comparison_steps.description: Certificate lists 11 article numbers. Verify each against invoice.
comparison_steps.details: All 11 article numbers match exactly: 009682, 004702, 007644, 007627, 007641, 009683, 007639, 006774, 006916, 007642, 227185. Each article number in the certificate is found identically in the invoice Part no column.

comparison_steps.description: Verify product descriptions alongside article numbers.
comparison_steps.details: Each article description in the certificate matches the corresponding invoice description after normalization. Examples: Cert 'Interface/BackCoverKit Vivo1,2' = Invoice 'Interface/BackCoverKit Vivo1,2'; Cert 'VIVO 5x / 6x PSU' = Invoice 'VIVO 5x / 6x PSU'; Cert 'CPU board Vivo 3 Multi' = Invoice 'CPU board Vivo 3 Multi'; etc. All descriptions match. Summary line 'Medical devices and accessories' matches invoice header 'MEDICAL DEVICES AND ACCESSORIES'. '2 Pallets' matches invoice '2 Pallets'.
No significant additions that alter product identity.

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH – all 11 article numbers match exactly

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate lists 11 articles with part numbers and descriptions. Invoice contains identical part numbers (009682, 004702, 007644, 007627, 007641, 009683, 007639, 006774, 006916, 007642, 227185) with matching descriptions and quantities per line. Summary: certificate 'Medical devices and accessories, 2 Pallets' matches invoice 'MEDICAL DEVICES AND ACCESSORIES, 2 Pallets'. All article numbers verified per Prioritet 1 (4.3.2). Descriptions verified per 4.3.3. Result: MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: All 11 article numbers in the certificate match exactly in the invoice. Product descriptions match after normalization. Summary description and package count (2 Pallets) also match. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states '156 KG GROSS'. Numeric value: 156. Unit: KG. Weight category: GROSS.
comparison_steps.details: All required elements present: numeric value (156), unit (KG), weight category (GROSS).

comparison_steps.description: Search for value 156 KG in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Total Weight column: '156 KG'. Numeric value 156 matches exactly. Unit KG matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies GROSS. Invoice states 'Total Weight' without explicit GW/NW designation.
comparison_steps.details: Per rule 4.4.4: difference in weight category naming ('GROSS' vs 'Total Weight') shall not in itself cause MISMATCH when numeric value and unit match. Invoice does not contain a separate NW value that would create ambiguity. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value without explicit category, value matches in invoice, no conflicting alternative weight → MATCH.

rules_applied.rule_description: Förekomstkontroll – numeric value identified in invoice
Krav på kvantitetsuppgift – all elements present
Total vikt i faktura – weight category naming difference acceptable
Viktangivelse – single weight value, no conflicting alternative

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '156 KG GROSS'. Invoice Total Weight: '156 KG'. Numeric value 156 matches exactly. Unit KG matches exactly. Certificate specifies GROSS; invoice says 'Total Weight' without GW/NW. Per rule 4.4.4, difference in weight category naming does not cause MISMATCH when value and unit match. Invoice contains only one weight value (156 KG) with no conflicting alternative. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, single weight value matches → MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MANUAL_REVIEW because invoice does not explicitly state 'Gross Weight'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rejected per rule 4.4.4: difference in weight category naming acceptable when numeric value and unit match, and per 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value, no conflicting alternative.

quantity.motivation: Certificate: 156 KG GROSS. Invoice: 156 KG (Total Weight). Numeric value and unit match exactly. No conflicting weight in invoice. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin declaration in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains explicit origin declaration: 'The exporter of the products covered by this document declares that except where otherwise clearly indicated these products are of the origin of Sweden.' This is an explicit origin statement matching 'Goods are of … origin' pattern.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin 'Sweden' with invoice origin 'Sweden'.
comparison_steps.details: 'Sweden' in certificate matches 'Sweden' in invoice origin declaration. No normalization needed.

rules_applied.rule_description: Origin identification – explicit origin declaration found in invoice
Positive verification – origin 'Sweden' explicitly identified in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice contains explicit origin statement: 'The exporter of the products covered by this document declares that except where otherwise clearly indicated these products are of the origin of Sweden.' The word 'Sweden' is explicitly stated as the origin. Direct match with no normalization required. Result: MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origin: Sweden. Invoice contains explicit origin declaration stating 'the origin of Sweden'. Direct exact match. MATCH.

evidence_records.raw_text: The exporter of the products covered by this document declares that except where otherwise clearly indicated these products are of the origin of Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number 'SEG-26D-467261' does not contain an LC reference in bankterm context.

Certificate file (Document A) contains certificate on page 1 and embedded invoice copy on page 2. Invoice file (Document B) contains the independent invoice PI61085. Per rule 8.5.0, verification uses Document B (separate invoice file) as the invoice, not the embedded copy in Document A.
Consignor 'Breas Medical AB' found in invoice (criterion 2). Consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' found in invoice delivery address (criterion 3). Pairing validated.
Consignor 'Breas Medical AB' found in invoice footer, branding block, and signatory block.
SE-prefix in VAT number SE556434896801 confirms Sweden.
Customer address (billing) = 'Total Care'. Certificate consignee 'Swift Egypt Limited' does not match billing party.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Ship-To-regel – Certificate issued for end recipient
rule_evaluation_log.details: All 4 conditions met. Swift Egypt Limited matches delivery address exactly. Total Care is billing intermediary. Both in same invoice. No contradictory information.
All 11 article numbers match exactly between certificate and invoice.
Certificate 156 KG GROSS found as 156 KG in invoice Total Weight.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Total vikt i faktura – weight category naming
rule_evaluation_log.details: Weight category naming difference (GROSS vs Total Weight) acceptable per rule.
Explicit origin declaration found: 'the origin of Sweden'.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Breas Medical AB i Sverige bekräftas i fakturan. Mottagaren Swift Egypt Limited i Egypten återfinns i fakturans leveransadress. Samtliga 11 artikelnummer och varubeskrivningar matchar. Vikten 156 KG matchar. Ursprungslandet Sverige bekräftas genom en uttrycklig ursprungsdeklaration i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.95. Overall comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent.
